# Release Workflow

Create concise release notes from reviewed repository changes. Group entries by user impact and
keep every claim grounded in the supplied change set.

## Task Examples

- Create release notes for the current branch.
- Summarize the reviewed changes for customers.

## Constraints

- Must cite the supplied change set.
- Never invent issue links or release dates.

## Terminology

- `change set`: the reviewed commits and pull requests included in a release.
- `customer impact`: the observable effect of a change on users.
